privileged_info_summary: The gradient_fill@1 task uses real landscape images from Unsplash (primary: photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4, fallback: photo-1441974231531-c6227db76b6e), each 800x600 pixels. The environment is example.gimp_env@0.1. The task requires applying a horizontal gradient from left to right across at least 70% of the image (not the entire image as the description claims). The verifier checks four criteria: horizontal gradient detection (avg_smoothness > 0.3, avg_monotonic > 0.6), smooth transitions (horizontal_variance < 5000), full width coverage (avg_color_range > 30), and significant image modification (≥50% of pixels changed). Pass threshold is 75% (3 of 4 criteria). The task timeout is 90 seconds with maximum 10 steps.
